videos.headline: ECU takes down Pitt in the Military Bowl
videos.description: ECU and Pittsburgh exchange big plays all second half as the Pirates take down the Panthers in the Military bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (ECU takes down Pitt in the Military Bowl) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: ECU recovers Pitt fumble
videos.description: Pittsburgh has trouble with a pitch and East Carolina's J.D. Lampley jumps on the ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nick Mazzie kicks 42-yard field goal) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: East Carolina turns Pitt over on downs again
videos.description: East Carolina shuts down another Pittsburgh fourth-down attempt to take over possession.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (East Carolina turns Pitt over on downs again) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pitt's mascot takes out George Washington to help Abe Lincoln win race
videos.description: ROC the Panther lays out George Washington as Abraham Lincoln claims victory in the Presidents Race.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Pitt's mascot takes out George Washington to help Abe Lincoln win race) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mason Heintschel throws ridiculous TD pass off his back foot
videos.description: Mason Heintschel finds Raphael Williams Jr. for Pitt’s first touchdown just before the break.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mason Heintschel throws ridiculous TD pass off his back foot) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Smith capitalizes on Pitt turnover for ECU TD
videos.description: Chaston Ditta finds Anthony Smith for a touchdown after ECU forces fumble to go up on Pitt 10-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Smith capitalizes on Pitt turnover for ECU TD) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: East Carolina forces a fumble on strip sack
videos.description: Kendrick DuJour knocks the ball loose and recovers the fumble for East Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (East Carolina forces a fumble on strip sack) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: East Carolina responds to Pitt's defensive score with a 72-yard TD
videos.description: Chaston Ditta throws a 72-yard touchdown pass to Anthony Smith as East Carolina reclaims a lead against Pittsburgh.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chaston Ditta throws 72-yard touchdown pass to Anthony Smith) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pitt scores defensive TD after 'inadvertent whistle' erases ECU TD
videos.description: A would-be ECU touchdown is blown dead by an inadvertent whistle, then Pitt's Rasheem Biles scores on a fumble recovery several plays later.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pitt scores defensive TD after 'inadvertent whistle' erases ECU TD) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: ECU's Kevon Merrell forces Pitt's 5th turnover with a 70-yard INT
